results.title: Reminder: Thailand requires foreign visitors to show proof of funds upon entry
results.description: Thailand reminds foreign visitors to have proof of sufficient funds ready for entry, based on longstanding immigration rules.

results.title: AEP president asks CSM for legislative clarification as 37 magistrates claim RON 5.5 mln in lawsuits
results.description: President of the Permanent Electoral Authority (AEP) Adrian Tutuianu requested a meeting with the Supreme Council of Magistrates (CSM) for legislative clarification after 37 magistrates filed lawsuits against the AEP, claiming amounts totalling RON 5...

results.title: Xenophobic Attacks: Senate Declines Calls For FG To Take Over South African Owned MTN, DStv
results.description: The Senate on Tuesday rejected calls to nationalise South African-owned businesses, including MTN and DStv, in retaliation for the ongoing xenophobic attacks on Nigerians, even as it strongly condemned the violence and urged the Federal Government to intensify diplomatic efforts to protect Nigerians in the country. The discussion forms the second time in two months [...] The post Xenophobic Attacks: Senate Declines Calls For FG To Take Over South African Owned MTN, DStv appeared first on Information Nigeria .
